pov: Imbila.AI is the consulting & IP arm to the 2nth.ai execution platform. For Google AI we do not duplicate official material — we curate the best official sources (the tools are free) and recommend them in a sensible order. Learning is on imbila.ai; building, models and infrastructure live on 2nth.ai.

resources.title: Google Skills
resources.whenToUse: The unified hub for Google's official training (Cloud Skills Boost, DeepMind, Grow with Google). Best starting point for structured courses.

resources.title: Google AI Essentials
resources.whenToUse: Google's flagship beginner course for practical AI skills in any role. No experience needed.

resources.title: Gemini
resources.whenToUse: Learn by using Google's assistant on your real work.

resources.title: Google AI Studio
resources.whenToUse: Experiment with Gemini models and export working code — free, browser-based, no setup. The bridge from idea to first app.

resources.title: NotebookLM
resources.whenToUse: An AI research tool grounded only in sources you provide — summaries, Q&A, audio overviews, cited to your material.

resources.title: Gemini for Google Workspace
resources.whenToUse: For teams already on Workspace who want AI inside Docs, Sheets, Gmail and Meet.

resources.title: Google AI for Developers
resources.whenToUse: Gemini API docs, quickstarts and SDKs when you start building with Google AI.

resources.title: Generative AI Learning Path
resources.whenToUse: A hands-on path from LLM basics to prompt engineering in Google Cloud.

resources.title: Gemini explainer (know.2nth.ai)
resources.whenToUse: For an independent, fact-checked deep-dive on how the Gemini/Google AI stack works and its trade-offs.

resources.title: Imbila Claude 4D Academy
resources.whenToUse: If they want a guided, interactive Imbila course (lessons + AI tutor + assessments) rather than self-serve links — our flagship, built on the 4D AI-Fluency framework.

resources.title: 2nth.ai
resources.whenToUse: When they have learned enough and want to actually build, deploy or run AI in production.
